# giomjds.vercel.app llms.txt

> This website is Gio Majadas' personal portfolio. It presents public information about software development projects, skills, certifications, and contact options for collaboration.

- [Homepage](https://giomjds.vercel.app/): Professional overview, highlights, and portfolio entry points.
- [About](https://giomjds.vercel.app/about): Background, skill sets, services, and development journey milestones.
- [Projects](https://giomjds.vercel.app/projects): Project catalog with technology stacks and detail pages.
- [Certificates](https://giomjds.vercel.app/certificates): Verified credentials and certifications.
- [Contact](https://giomjds.vercel.app/contact): Contact form and direct communication route.

This file is informational and only describes content that is publicly available on the site.
